name: User can go to settings and see the right number of UI elements **

steps.name: Given Open the main page https://soft.reelly.io
When Log in to the page
And Click on the settings option
Then Verify the right page opens
And Verify there are 18 options for the settings
And Verify the “connect the company” button is available

fullName: run the test: User can go to settings and see the right number of UI elements **
